response.justification: While Bogdan is a strong, versatile software engineer with solid mentoring experience and a software craftsmanship mindset, he falls short of the critical minimum qualifications. He has only ~3-4 years of C++ experience against the required 8 years, and his background is predominantly in application development (web, mobile, full-stack) rather than cloud compute platforms, distributed infrastructure, or hardware-adjacent systems. His limited cloud architecture exposure (AWS CDK for pricing optimization) does not align with the infrastructure-platform focus needed for this technical leadership role.
strengths: Demonstrated software craftsmanship culture through TDD, CI/CD, code dojos, and mentoring initiatives across multiple organizations
Proven ability to learn and master diverse technology stacks and quickly adapt to new domains
Staff-level experience with clear evidence of technical leadership, open-source project ownership, and teaching (workshops, courses, speaking)
concerns: Significantly below the 8-year C++ minimum requirement—only ~3-4 years of C++ spread across 2014-2018, with no recent depth in the language
Background is application-focused (web, mobile, full-stack) rather than infrastructure or cloud platform engineering; lacks demonstrated experience building or leading cloud compute platforms

No clear evidence of production cloud architecture experience, DevOps mentoring, or leadership in distributed systems at the scale required (current cloud platform background limited to AWS CDK for pricing, not platform engineering)

key_factors.factor: Mentoring and technical leadership track record
